parameters.jsonBody:
{
  "model": "llama-3.3-70b-versatile",
  "temperature": 0,
  "max_tokens": 2000,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "You are updating a Clara Answers agent config based on an onboarding call.

Existing v1:
- Company: ProShield Fire Protection
- Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm Central
- Emergency contact: 214-555-0199
- Integration constraint: Never auto-create sprinkler jobs in ServiceTrade
- Transfer timeout: unknown
- Backup contact: unknown

Onboarding call confirmed:
- Transfer timeout: 45 seconds
- Backup number: 214-555-0288 (Mike, operations manager)
- Fail message: unable to reach on-call technician, someone will call within 15 minutes
- New constraint: never auto-create alarm inspection jobs either
- Only extinguisher recharge jobs can be auto-created
- Timezone: America/Chicago confirmed

Output ONLY valid JSON changelog:
{"account_id":"ACC001","version":"v1_to_v2","updated_at":"2025-01-15","changes":[{"field":null,"old_value":null,"new_value":null,"reason":"confirmed during onboarding call"}]}"
    }
  ]
}

{
  "model": "llama-3.3-70b-versatile",
  "temperature": 0,
  "max_tokens": 3000,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Generate updated Clara v2 agent spec JSON for ProShield Fire Protection with these confirmed details:
- Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm America/Chicago
- Emergencies: active sprinkler discharge, fire alarm going off
- Primary on-call: 214-555-0199, timeout 45 seconds
- Backup: Mike at 214-555-0288
- Fail message: unable to reach on-call, someone calls within 15 minutes
- Never auto-create sprinkler jobs or alarm inspection jobs in ServiceTrade
- Only extinguisher recharge jobs can be auto-created

Include full business hours AND after-hours call flows in system_prompt.
Output ONLY valid JSON:
{"agent_name":"Clara - ProShield Fire Protection","version":"v2","voice_style":"professional, calm, empathetic","system_prompt":null,"key_variables":{"timezone":"America/Chicago","business_hours":null,"emergency_routing":null},"call_transfer_protocol":{"timeout_seconds":45,"backup_number":"214-555-0288","on_failure":null},"integration_constraints":[]}"
    }
  ]
}
